title: Spar India is Hiring: Floor Manager (Entry-Level)

jsonLd.title: Spar India is Hiring: Floor Manager (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Spar India is actively seeking a talented and motivated Floor Manager to join our dynamic team in Kanpur. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Spar India:
Spar India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Life and accident insurance
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Kanpur, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Spar India!
